name: Blueberry Cream Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 can (1.5 lb) of blueberry pie filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve gelatin in boiling water. Set aside to cool.
2. Stir in the pie filling and lemon juice. Chill until partially set.
3. Spoon half the gelatin mixture into an 8½ by 4½ by 2½-inch loaf dish. Chill until set.
4. Keep the remaining gelatin at room temperature.
5. Combine sour cream and sugar in a separate bowl.
6. Spread the mixture evenly over the gelatin in the loaf dish.
7. Top with a layer of the remaining gelatin.
8. Chill for 4 to 5 hours or overnight until firm.
9. Cut into squares and serve on crisp salad greens. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
